name: X-Golf Glen Carbon
address: 86 Magnolia Dr A, Glen Carbon, IL 62034
about: X-Golf Glen Carbon is an indoor golf venue featuring six state-of-the-art golf simulators. It offers a full bar and food service, making it suitable for both golf practice and social events. The venue provides various playing options including hourly simulator rentals, league play, and private lessons, catering to different skill levels and group sizes. They also have an annual membership program that provides discounts on hourly rates.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology
Multiple league formats available for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with tasty bites available on site.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full kitchen and bar available for all guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally takes about 1 hour for an individual player to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages.
